  • [beginSyl][middleSyl][endSyl]
  • [beginSyl][middleSyl][middleSyl][endSyl]
  • [colonistsToLendCount] colonists
  • [commanderLandingDesc] has died.\n\n[failLetterEndingCommon]
  • [commanderLandingDesc] was not on board when the shuttle departed.\n\n[goodwillSomeCiviliansLost]\n\n[failLetterEndingCommon]
  • [commanderLandingDesc], has escaped. [asker_pronoun] is grateful for the help [asker_pronoun] received at [map_definite].\n\n[successLetterEndingCommon]
  • [commanderLandingDesc], has escaped.\n\n[goodwillSomeCiviliansLost]\n\n[successLetterEndingCommon]
  • [constAdj] [construction]
  • [countToHunt] [animalToHunt_labelPlural]
  • [damaged] [shuttle]
  • [decreeIntro]
  • [defToProduce_label] production decree
  • [emergency] [landing]
  • [empire] of [ofThing]
  • [enemiesLabel] have set up a camp and are harassing caravans of [asker_faction_name]. [asker_nameDef] is planning an aerial assault on the camp, which is guarded by [enemiesCount] [enemiesLabel]. [asker_pronoun] wants you to provide [soldiers] to carry out the attack.\n\n[asker_pronoun] will send a shuttle to pick up your fighters, bring them to the attack site, and take them home afterward. They will be fed en-route.\n\nOnce the attack begins, you must defeat all enemies and turrets within [timeoutTicks_duration].
  • [enemyFaction_leaderTitle]
  • [enemyFaction_pawnsPlural] for Favor
  • [enemyFaction_pawnsPlural] from the [enemyFaction_name] have arrived. They will attack the [asker_faction_pawnsPlural] who crashed at [map_definite].\n\nDefend the [asker_faction_pawnsPlural] until their rescue shuttle arrives in [rescueShuttleAfterRaidDelay_duration].
  • [enemyFaction_pawnsPlural] of Fortune
  • [enemyFaction_pawnsPlural]
  • [faction_name] is ready to grant [pawn_definite] the title of [newTitle] and the power of a level [psylinkLevel] psylink in a bestowing ceremony.\n\nThe bestower will arrive by shuttle and perform the ceremony.\n\nThe bestower will only give a title if any throneroom requirements are satisfied.\n\nYou can betray the bestower to steal psylink neuroformers, but this will make [faction_name] your enemy.\n\nIf you miss or fail this ceremony, there will be another opportunity later. If the bestower or guards are harmed for any reason, there will be diplomatic consequences.
  • [factionOpponent_nameDef] has learned that one of the members of the [faction_name] is no longer at [map_definite]. [factionOpponent_nameDef] wanted all members of the [faction_name] to die and has therefore retracted [factionOpponent_possessive] offer.
  • [factionOpponent_nameDef] promised you a reward if you killed [asker_nameDef] [otherMembers]. [factionOpponent_pronoun] has heard news this has been done and is sending you the following via drop pod (total value [betrayalRewardMarketValue_money]):\n\n[betrayalRewards].\n\n[questOver]
  • [factionOpponent_nameDef], a [factionOpponent_faction_pawnSingular] of [factionOpponent_faction_name], has learned that [asker_nameDef] [otherLodgers] [areIs] being hosted at [map_definite]. [factionOpponent_pronoun] is enemies with [asker_nameDef] and wants to see [asker_objective] dead.\n\n[factionOpponent_pronoun] will send you the following reward if you kill all members of [faction_name] (total value [betrayalRewardMarketValue_money]):\n\n[betrayalRewards]
  • [failLetterEndingQuest]\n\nYour relations with [asker_faction_name] have decreased by [goodwillPenalty].

  • [intro]The [asker_faction_leaderTitle] of [asker_faction_name] will perform a customary visit with any Count of his domain upon request. Invite him, satisfy his royal needs for [shuttleDelayTicks_duration], and all of you can ride the shuttle to the Imperial flotilla. You may then join the Imperial court, or escape to a new life among the stars.

  • [lodgersLabelSingOrPluralDef] [areIs] sick with blood rot and will require daily treatment. The disease can be slowed with high-quality care and medicine, but generally cannot be cured outright. If the disease becomes severe [lodgersLabelSingOrPluralDef] will die, so ensure you have the necessary medical supplies.

  • [rewardGiver_nameDef] has contacted you. [rewardDelayTicks_duration] ago, you helped [rewardGiver_objective] in desperate circumstances.\n\nSince then, [rewardGiver_pronoun] has gotten back on [rewardGiver_possessive] feet, and now [rewardGiver_pronoun] wants to reward you properly for your help. [rewardGiver_pronoun] is sending you the following via drop pod:\n\n[listOfRewards]
  • [shuttle] [crash]
  • [site/enemyFaction_name]
  • [site/enemyFaction_pawnsPlural] of [site/enemyFaction_name]
  • [site/site_label] for [asker_nameDef]
  • [site/site_label] for Pay
  • [target] [attack]
  • [threatDescriptionParagraph]
  • [titleHeir_nameDef]'s inheritance
  • [townname_fixed]
  • [townname_wordgen]
  • [violence] for Favor
  • [violence] for Hire
  • [violence] for Profit

  • [WordImperial][townend]
  • [WordImperial]
  • [worker] Lending
  • [worker] Outsourcing
  • [worker]s for [asker_faction_name]
  • \n - [thingToProduceLabel]
  • \n(*Threat)[groupsOf](/Threat) from [enemyFaction_name] have been harassing [asker_possessive] caravans in the area. [asker_nameDef] asks that you send them a challenge message, attracting them to attack and eliminating the threat yourself.[endingCommon]
  • \n[allThreats]
  • \n[asker_nameDef] knows the location of key outpost containing everything needed to develop psychic powers:\n\n[sitePart1_itemStashContents]
  • \n[asker_pronoun] will bestow [royalFavorReward] [asker_faction_royalFavorLabel] on whoever accepts this quest. This is enough [asker_faction_royalFavorLabel] to receive the royal title of Yeoman, and all benefits that come with it - including the first level of psychic powers.
  • \n[commonEnding]
  • \n[condDesc]
  • \n[decreeThreatInfo]
  • \n[joiner_nameDef] is too frantic to offer more information.
  • \n[joiner_pronoun] begs for safety and offers to join you at [map_definite].[joiner_relationInfo]
  • \n[monumentRequiredResources]
  • \n\n[asker_nameDef]'s enemies have hired [enemyFaction_name] to hunt [asker_objective]. [enemyGroupsParagraph]
  • \n\n[asker_nameDef]'s enemies have some provoked a mechanoid hive into hunting the prisoners, so it will send mechanoid attack groups. [enemyGroupsParagraph]
  • \n\n[asker_nameDef]'s enemies have somehow provoked mechanoids into hunting [asker_objective]. [enemyGroupsParagraph]
  • \n\n[asker_nameDef]'s enemies provoked mechanoids into to hunting [asker_objective]. [enemyGroupsParagraph]
  • \n\n[bloodRotInfo]
  • \n\n[enemyFaction_pawnsPlural] from [enemyFaction_name] are trying to kill poor little [lodgers0_nameDef] to get at [asker_nameDef]. If you accept [lodgers0_nameDef], [enemyGroupsParagraph]
  • \n\n[helpersCount] [helperKind_labelPlural] will be placed under your control. You will have to feed and house them, but they may die in battle without consequence.\n\n
  • \n\n[helpersCount] [helpersLabelSingOrPlural] [helpersHasHave] been sent to assist you.
  • \n\n[lodgers0_nameDef] is a gift promised to [asker_nameDef]'s child for a marriage ceremony. To try to prevent the marriage, [enemyFaction_name] is sending [enemyFaction_pawnsPlural] after [lodgers0_objective]. If you accept [lodgers0_nameDef], [enemyGroupsParagraph]
  • \n\n[lodgers0_nameDef] recently spat on the most loved child of [enemyFaction_leader_nameFull], [enemyFaction_leaderTitle] of [enemyFaction_name]. [enemyFaction_leader_nameDef] will send [enemyFaction_pawnsPlural] to seek revenge on any who would protect [lodgers0_objective]. [enemyGroupsParagraph]
  • \n\n[lodgers0_nameDef] was recently caught [wrongAct]. Seeking revenge, [enemyFaction_pawnsPlural] will come for [lodgers0_objective] as long as [lodgers0_pronoun] is with you. [enemyGroupsParagraph]
  • \n\n[lodgersLabelSingOrPluralDef] [appreciateAppreciates] quality accommodation. You will gain goodwill with [asker_faction_name] if you keep [theirHisHer] average mood above 50%.
  • \n\n[lodgersLabelSingOrPluralDef] will not do any work.
  • \n\n[paralyzedInfo]\n\n[bloodRotInfo]
  • \n\n[paralyzedInfo]
  • \n\n[pawnKindsParagraph][helpersParagraph]If you accept, the [enemyFaction_pawnsPlural] will arrive in [firstRaidDelayTicks_duration].
  • \n\n[pawnKindsParagraph]\n\nIf you accept, the [enemyFaction_pawnsPlural] will arrive in [firstRaidDelayTicks_duration].
  • \n\n[threatsInfoMechClustersMultiAnimal] [enemyGroupsParagraph]
  • \n\n[threatsInfoMechClustersMultiPrisoners] [enemyGroupsParagraph]
  • \n\n[threatsInfoMechClustersSingleAnimal] [enemyGroupsParagraph]
  • \n\n[threatsInfoMechClustersSingleHuman] [enemyGroupsParagraph]
  • \n\n[threatsInfoMechRaidsMultiAnimal] [enemyGroupsParagraph]
  • \n\n[threatsInfoMechRaidsMultiHuman] [enemyGroupsParagraph]
  • \n\n[threatsInfoMechRaidsSingleAnimal] [enemyGroupsParagraph]
  • \n\n[threatsInfoMechRaidsSingleHuman] [enemyGroupsParagraph]
  • \n\nA [helperKind_label] will be placed under your control. You will have to feed and house [helpers0_objective], but [helpers0_pronoun] may die in battle without consequence.\n\n
  • \n\nIf the monument is destroyed within [keepMonumentTicks_duration] days of construction, your relations with [asker_factionName] will fall by [goodwillChangeIfMonumentDestroyed].
  • \n\nOthers will take the opportunity to try to kill the [asker_faction_leaderTitle], and will attack with great intensity. Be prepared to defend.
  • \n\nThe [lodgersLabelPlural] are necessary for [asker_nameDef] to fulfill an important trade promise. To provoke conflict, [enemyFaction_name] is sending [enemyFaction_pawnsPlural] after them. If you accept the [lodgersLabelPlural], [enemyGroupsParagraph]
  • \n\nThe animal rescue activists stole [lodgers0_nameDef] from a slaughtering ceremony being held by [enemyFaction_name]. Now the [enemyFaction_pawnsPlural] are coming to seek revenge. If you accept [lodgers0_nameDef], [enemyGroupsParagraph]
  • \n\nThe pods contain these dangers:
  • \n\nThe prisoners committed a string of murders against the [enemyFaction_pawnsPlural] of [enemyFaction_name], and their victims' families will send raids to seek revenge. [enemyGroupsParagraph]
  • \n\nThe prisoners have a paid rescue contract with [enemyFaction_name], so they will send [enemyFaction_pawnsPlural] after you. [enemyGroupsParagraph]
  • \n\nThe prisoners recently [mechViolation], and have been targeted by a mechanoid hive. [enemyGroupsParagraph]
  • \n\nThe travelers recently [mechViolation], and have been targeted by an orbiting mechanoid swarm. [enemyGroupsParagraph]
  • \n\nThese travelers were recently invited to an important ceremony with [enemyFaction_name], but showed up drunk and profaned the ritual. [enemyFaction_name] is now sending raids after them. [enemyGroupsParagraph]
  • \n\nUnfortunately, [asker_nameDef]'s court rivals are paying [enemyFaction_name] to try to break the lover out and bring the story to light. [enemyGroupsParagraph]
  • \n\nUnfortunately, [asker_nameDef]'s court rivals have provoked mechanoids attacks from [enemyFaction_name] to try to break the lover out and bring the story to light. [enemyGroupsParagraph]
  • \n\nUnfortunately, [enemyFaction_name] is hunting the [lodgersLabelPlural] to try to hurt [asker_nameDef] personally. If you accept the [lodgersLabelPlural], [enemyGroupsParagraph]
  • \n\nUnfortunately, [enemyFaction_name] wants to spread the shameful story and is sending raids to break [lodgers0_nameDef] out of jail. [enemyGroupsParagraph]
  • \n\nUnfortunately, [enemyFaction_pawnsPlural] from [enemyFaction_name] revered the vault that the prisoners were extracted from. They'll send raids to seek revenge on anyone who holds them. [enemyGroupsParagraph]
  • \n\nUnfortunately, [enemyFaction_pawnsPlural] from [enemyFaction_name] were guarding the vault that the prisoners were extracted from. They'll send mechanoids to hunt down the lost sleepers. [enemyGroupsParagraph]
  • \n\nUnfortunately, these [lodgersLabelPlural] were recently implicated in the death of a [victim]. Now, [enemyFaction_pawnsPlural] from [enemyFaction_name] are hunting them for ritual revenge. If you accept the [lodgersLabelPlural], [enemyGroupsParagraph]
  • \n\nyou must keep the mood of [lodgersLabelSingOrPluralDef] above [lodgersMoodThreshold_percent].
  • \nAfter completion, you'll have to protect the monument for [haveToProtectForTicks_duration]. If any piece of it is destroyed, [asker2]'s enforcement system will activate and [threatDescription]
  • \nBeware - If you accept [asker_nameDef], you will become an enemy of [asker_factionName]! The pursuing loyalty squad will attack immediately. It is composed of: \n\n[raid/raidPawnKinds]
  • \nConstruction must be completed within [constructionTimeoutTicks_duration] of accepting the task. You'll receive the rewards when you finish construction.[dontDestroyMonument]
  • \nConstruction must be completed within [constructionTimeoutTicks_duration] of accepting the task.
  • \nDesperate to stay hidden, [joiner_nameDef] claims to be unable to tell you more about [joiner_objective]self.
  • \nDuring his visit, you must keep his mood above [lodgersMoodThreshold_percent]. This means providing royal perquisites like a lavish bedroom.[threatsInfo]
  • \nEarning the title of Count means completing quests to earn [asker_faction_royalFavorLabel] with [asker_faction_name]. It may take years to finally achieve the title of Count.
  • \nFailing to finish the monument within 20 days is considered to profane the ritual. Your relations with [asker_factionName] will fall by 25, and the heir will not be changed.
  • \nIf the monument is destroyed within [keepMonumentTicks_duration] days after completion, your relations with [asker_factionName] will fall by [goodwillChangeIfMonumentDestroyed].
  • \nIf you accept [joiner_nameDef], both [raid1/enemyFaction_name] and [raid2/enemyFaction_name] will raid you in [raidDelayTicks_duration].
  • \nIf you accept [joiner_nameDef], the manhunting [animalKind_label] will follow in [manhuntersDelayTicks_duration].
  • \nIf you accept [joiner_nameDef], the manhunting [animalKind_labelPlural] will follow in [manhuntersDelayTicks_duration].
  • \nIf you accept [joiner_objective], [joinersEnemies] will set up a site nearby to harass you. [site/allSitePartsDescriptions]
  • \nIf you accept, (*Threat)an infestation of [hivesCount] hives(/Threat) will begin in [infestationDelayTicks_duration].
  • \nOnly accept if you wish to fight against [asker_factionName] and develop your psycasters on your own. You will have one year to attack the outpost before it is moved.
  • \nThe [asker_faction_leaderTitle] will bring four of his personal guards and place them under your command. You must house these guards, but the [asker_faction_leaderTitle] will not complain if they are killed or unhappy.
  • \nThe mechanoid cluster will be initially dormant. It may have a countdown activator, or it may stay dormant forever until disturbed.[helpersParagraph]
  • \nThe monument will be [monumentSize] in size and will require these resources (total value [monumentRequiredResourcesMarketValue_money]):
  • \nThe threat will remain until you go to destroy it.
  • \nThere's some kind of threat following [joiner_nameDef], but [joiner_pronoun] is unwilling to say what it is or when it might follow. [joiner_pronoun] is also unwilling to tell you more about [joiner_objective]self.
  • \nYou may need to plant and grow the [plantToHarvest_label] first.
  • \nYou must build a monument. It is [monumentSize] in size and will require these resources (total value [monumentRequiredResourcesMarketValue_money]):
  • \nYou must harvest [plantToHarvest_label] x[harvestItemCount].
  • \nYou must hunt or slaughter [animalToHuntWithCount].
  • \nYou must keep the monument safe for [keepMonumentTicks_duration] after completion, otherwise [asker_nameDef] will be unhappy.
  • \nYou must keep the visitors at [map_definite] and not send them anywhere else. If you fail this quest or migrate, you will have another chance at it later.
  • \nYou must produce:
  • \nYou'll receive the rewards when you finish construction.
  • {FACTION_leaderNameDef} thanks you for allowing {FACTION_leaderObjective} to stay at [map_definite] for these [questDurationTicks_duration]. {FACTION_leaderPronoun} is now moving on with {FACTION_leaderPossessive} people.\n\n{FACTION_leaderNameDef} says {FACTION_leaderPronoun} won't forget what you've done.
  • {SUBJECT_definite} the [lodgersLabel]
  • {SUBJECT_definite}, [oneOfThe] has died.
  • {SUBJECT_definite}, [oneOfThe], was violated by surgery.
  • {SUBJECT_definite}, the [lastOrNot] desperate [faction_pawnSingular] [whoAskedToStay], has died.\n\n[questOver]
  • {SUBJECT_definite}

  • a (*Threat)manhunting [animalKind_label](/Threat)
  • A [AdjectiveBadass] [beast]
  • a [animalAdj] [lodgersLabel]
  • a [asker_royalTitleInCurrentFaction]
  • A [constAdj] [construction]
  • A [joiner_age]-year-old [joiner_title] named [joiner_nameDef] is calling from nearby. [joiner_pronoun] admits [joiner_pronoun] profaned a peace ritual between [raid1/enemyFaction_name] and [raid2/enemyFaction_name]. Now they are both chasing [joiner_objective]!
  • A [joiner_age]-year-old [joiner_title] named [joiner_nameDef] is calling from nearby. [joiner_pronoun] is begging to join you at [map_definite].[joiner_relationInfo]
  • A [joiner_age]-year-old [joiner_title] named [joiner_nameDef] is calling from nearby. [joiner_pronoun] says (*Threat)a manhunting [animalKind_label](/Threat) is hunting [joiner_objective]!
  • A [joiner_age]-year-old [joiner_title] named [joiner_nameDef] is calling from nearby. [joiner_pronoun] says (*Threat)a pack of [animalCount] manhunting [animalKind_labelPlural](/Threat) are hunting [joiner_objective]!
  • A [joiner_age]-year-old [joiner_title] named [joiner_nameDef] is calling from nearby. [joiner_pronoun] says [joiner_pronoun] poisoned an underground insect colony, but now [joiner_pronoun] is soaked in insect pheromones and the bugs are hunting [joiner_objective]!
  • A [joiner_age]-year-old [joiner_title] named [joiner_nameFull] is calling for help! [joiner_pronoun] is hiding from [hidingFrom]. [joiner_pronoun] wants to flee and join you at [map_definite].[joiner_relationInfo]
  • A [joiner_age]-year-old [joiner_title] named [joiner_nameFull] is calling from nearby. [joiner_pronoun] is hiding from [threat]. [joiner_pronoun] wants to flee [joiner_possessive] hiding spot and join you at [map_definite].[joiner_relationInfo]
  • A [lodgers0_title] named [lodgers0_nameFull] wants you to protect [lodgers0_objective] at [map_definite] for [shuttleDelayTicks_duration]. [allLodgerInfo][threatsInfo1][commonDescEnding]\n\n[joinerEnding]
  • a [lodgers0_title]
  • a delayed reward for refugee quest
  • A desperate [faction_pawnSingular] named [asker_nameDef] is approaching.
  • a friend
  • a gang of cannibals
  • A group of [lodgersCount] travelers want you to host them at [map_definite] for [shuttleDelayTicks_duration]. [allLodgerInfo][threatsInfo2][commonDescEnding]\n\n[joinerEnding]
  • a group of mechanoids
  • a hostile machine persona whom [joiner_pronoun] recently awoke
  • A machine persona in an orbiting ship wants to perform some planetary experiments. However, if she carries out her experiment, [gameConditionDescriptionFuture].\n\nShe is concerned about getting in trouble with the ethical review board, and is asking for your consent.
  • a malfunctioning climate control satellite
  • a malfunctioning weather control satellite
  • A mechanoid cluster has landed not far from [map_definite]. [allSitePartsDescriptions]\n\nThe mech cluster will remain until you send a team there to attack and destroy it.
  • A mechanoid swarm has been attacking [asker_possessive] settlements. [asker_pronoun] wants you to signal the mechs to distract them while [asker_pronoun] clears the hive. If you do, (*Threat)a mechanoid cluster(/Threat) will land at [map_definite].[dangersDescription]
  • A mysterious message has arrived. It seems it was transmitted by a machine persona that refuses to name itself. The message asks that you build a very specific monument.
  • A new site has appeared nearby.\n\n[allSitePartsDescriptions]
  • a new site will appear nearby, where [allSitePartsDescriptions] This threat will remain until you go destroy it.
  • a noble
  • a pack of (*Threat)[animalCount] manhunting [animalKind_labelPlural](/Threat) will arrive.
  • a pack of (*Threat)[animalCount] manhunting [animalKind_labelPlural](/Threat)
  • a pack of starving wolves
  • a royal
  • A shuttle of [asker_faction_name] has taken damage and is seeking a place to land. Its commander [asker_nameDef] wants to land at [map_definite].\n\n[enemyFaction_pawnsPlural] from [enemyFaction_name] will attack the crashed shuttle site in an attempt to kill its occupants. You must defend them.\n\nThe shuttle contains [asker_nameDef][andOtherCivilians] and [soldiers_count] [soldiers0_kind]s. The commander [andCivilians] must be rescued, but the [soldiers0_kind]s may be sacrificed.\n\nAfter [rescueDelay_duration], a rescue shuttle will come to pick up the survivors. You'll need to get them all on board within [leaveDelay_duration].
  • A trader is calling from nearby. [threat] are hunting him! He is asking you to signal them and draw them towards [map_definite] so he can escape.\n\nIf you send the signal, [askerEnemies] will activate a site nearby to harass you. [site/allSitePartsDescriptions] This site will remain until you go destroy it.
  • A trader is calling. (*Threat)A wild [animalKind_label](/Threat) is hunting him! He wants your help to draw the beast away from him.[endSection]
  • A trader is calling. A pack of (*Threat)[animalCount] wild [animalKind_labelPlural](/Threat) are hunting him! He wants your help to draw the animals away from him.[endSection]
  • A vengeful machine persona is threatening the [asker_faction_pawnsPlural] of [asker_faction_name]. [asker_faction_leaderTitle] [asker_nameFull] wants you to send a message to the persona accepting responsibility for their transgressions.\n\nIf you do, the persona will turn its anger on you. [gameConditionDescriptionFuture].
  • a vengeful machine persona who [joiner_pronoun] recently offended

  • However, [joiner_nameDef] can only destroy the mechanoids by activating an ancient EMI dynamo. If [joiner_pronoun] joins you, an EMI field will be generated, shutting down electrical devices for [gameConditionDuration_duration].
  • However, [joiner_nameDef] can only kill the gang by setting fire to a massive abandoned garbage pile nearby. If [joiner_pronoun] joins you, smoky fallout will block the sun for [gameConditionDuration_duration].
  • However, [joiner_nameDef] can only kill the wolves by setting fire to a massive toxic chemical dump nearby. [gameConditionDuration_duration] of toxic fallout will follow.
  • hunted
  • If [joiner_pronoun] joins you, an intense cold snap will last for [gameConditionDuration_duration] until the satellite resets.
  • If [joiner_pronoun] joins you, an intense heat wave will last for [gameConditionDuration_duration] until the satellite resets.
  • If [joiner_pronoun] joins you, the machine mind will blast [map_definite] with a [psychicDroneLevel]-level psychic drone for [gameConditionDuration_duration], reducing mood of all [psychicDroneGender]s.
  • If [joiner_pronoun] joins you, the persona will hit [map_definite] with psychic suppression waves for [gameConditionDuration_duration], reducing consciousness of all [psychicSuppressorGender]s.
  • If [joiner_pronoun] joins you, the weather will be [forcedWeather_label] for [gameConditionDuration_duration] until the satellite resets.
  • If you fail to fulfill this decree within [decreeDays] days, [asker_nameDef] will start to become unhappy. [asker_possessive] anger will increase over time until the decree is satisfied.
  • If you make [asker_objective] happy, [asker_pronoun] may offer to join you.
  • If you make them happy, some of them may offer to join you.

    Attributes:

    • Text:

  • $customLetterText
  • $returnLetterText
  • [asker_faction_name] are now hostile towards you. [failLetterEndingQuest]
  • [asker_nameDef] has forgotten about [asker_possessive] decree.
  • [asker_nameDef] has grudgingly cancelled the decree '[resolvedQuestName]' since it cannot be completed.
  • [asker_nameDef] is offended that you allowed the monument to be ruined so soon after completion.\n\n[asker_pronoun] will be unhappy about this.
  • [asker_nameDef] is offended that you allowed the monument to be ruined so soon after completion.\n\nYour relations with [asker_faction_name] have fallen by [goodwillChangeIfMonumentDestroyed].
  • [asker_nameDef] is offended that you promised to consecrate the new inheritance, but allowed the monument to be ruined soon after completion.\n\nYour relations with [asker_faction_name] have fallen by [goodwillChangeIfMonumentDestroyed].
  • [asker_nameDef] is offended that you promised to consecrate the new inheritance, but did not build the monument within the prescribed time.\n\nYou lost 25 goodwill with [asker_faction_name].
  • [faction_name] became hostile to you.
  • [letterSubject], who you were charged to protect, has been arrested. [remainingWillNowLeave][failLetterEndingQuest]
  • [letterSubject], who you were charged to protect, has died. [remainingWillNowLeave][failLetterEndingCommon]
  • [letterSubject], who you were charged to protect, has joined another faction. [remainingWillNowLeave][failLetterEndingCommon]
  • [letterSubject], who you were charged to protect, has run wild. [remainingWillNowLeave][failLetterEndingCommon]
  • [letterSubject], who you were charged to protect, is gone. [remainingWillNowLeave][failLetterEndingCommon]
  • [titleHeir_nameDef] is the new heir of [titleHolder_nameDef].
  • {SUBJECT_definite}, who was supposed to become heir to a title, has died.
  • {SUBJECT_definite}, who you were charged to host, has been arrested. [failLetterEndingCommon]
  • {SUBJECT_definite}, who you were charged to protect and keep happy, has been below the minimum mood of [lodgersMoodThreshold] too long. [failLetterEndingCommon]
  • {SUBJECT_definite}, who you were charged to protect and keep happy, has been below the minimum mood of [moodThreshold] too long.\n\n[remainingWillNowLeave]
  • {SUBJECT_definite}, who you were charged to protect, has been arrested. [failLetterEndingCommon]
  • {SUBJECT_definite}, who you were charged to protect, has died. [failLetterEndingCommon]
  • {SUBJECT_definite}, who you were charged to protect, has left the assigned settlement. [failLetterEndingCommon]
  • {SUBJECT_definite}, who you were charged to protect, has left the designated settlement. [failLetterEndingCommon]
  • {SUBJECT_definite}, who you were charged to protect, has run wild. [failLetterEndingCommon]
  • {SUBJECT_definite}, whose heir was in the process of being changed, has died.
  • A laborer sent to you by [permitFaction_name] has died. Your goodwill with [permitFaction_name] has fallen by [goodwillPenaltyPawn].
  • A shuttle has arrived to collect the laborers from [permitFaction_name].
  • Since the monument marker has been destroyed, a new one has been sent.
  • The [helpersLabelSingOrPlural] sent by [asker_nameDef] to aid you [helpersHasHave] spent too much time with you, and [helpersIsAre] now leaving.
  • The key imperial outpost, containing items needed for secret psychic powers, has packed up and moved on.
  • The laborers from [permitFaction_name] have arrived. A shuttle will come to collect them in [laborersDurationDays] days.
  • The monument for the quest '[resolvedQuestName]' has been violated. Consequences will follow.
  • The shuttle called by [asker_nameDef] has arrived.\n\nIf you don't use the shuttle, it will return to [permitFaction_name] in [shuttleReturnDays] days.
  • The shuttle from [permitFaction_name] has departed after being made to wait for too long.
  • The shuttle has arrived to collect [asker_nameDef].
  • The shuttle has arrived to collect [colonistsToLendCount] of your colonists.
  • The shuttle has arrived to collect [lodgersLabelSingOrPluralDef]. Be sure to have these people on the shuttle before it leaves in [shuttleLeaveDelayTicks_duration]:\n\n[lodgers]
  • The shuttle has arrived to collect the [asker_faction_leaderTitle].\n\nAll of you can accompany the [asker_faction_leaderTitle] on the shuttle and travel to the Imperial flotilla to begin a new life.
  • The shuttle sent to collect [asker_nameDef] has been destroyed. [asker_pronoun] will now leave on foot. [failLetterEndingCommon]
  • The shuttle sent to collect [asker_nameDef] has departed without [asker_objective]. [asker_pronoun] will now leave on foot. [failLetterEndingCommon]
  • The shuttle sent to collect [lodgersLabelSingOrPluralDef] has been destroyed. [lodgersLabelSingOrPluralDef] will now leave on foot. [failLetterEndingCommon]
  • The shuttle sent to collect [lodgersLabelSingOrPluralDef] has departed. [lodgersLabelSingOrPluralDef] will now leave on foot. [failLetterEndingCommon]
  • The shuttle sent to collect colonists has been destroyed.
  • The shuttle sent to collect the [asker_faction_leaderTitle] has been destroyed. [failLetterEndingCommon]
  • The shuttle sent to collect the [asker_faction_leaderTitle] has departed without [asker_objective]. [asker_pronoun] will now leave on foot. [failLetterEndingCommon]
  • The shuttle sent to drop off [pawnsLabelDef] has been destroyed. You have failed the quest '[resolvedQuestName]'.\n\nYour relations with [asker_faction_name] have changed by [goodwillChangeOnShuttleDestroyed].
  • Unauthorized, violating surgery has been performed on [letterSubject]. [remainingWillNowLeave][failLetterEndingCommon]
  • Unauthorized, violating surgery has been performed on {SUBJECT_definite}, who you were charged to protect. [failLetterEndingCommon]
  • Unauthorized, violating surgery has been performed on {SUBJECT_definite}, who you were charged to protect. Because of this violation, [asker_pronoun] will now attempt to leave. [failLetterEndingCommon]
  • You completed construction of the monument.\n\nYou must not destroy it for at least [keepMonumentTicks_duration], otherwise you will anger [asker_factionName] ([goodwillChangeIfMonumentDestroyed] goodwill).
  • You completed construction of the monument.\n\nYou must now protect the monument for [haveToProtectForTicks_duration]. If any piece of it is destroyed, [asker2]'s enforcement system will activate and [threatDescription]
  • You have completed construction of the monument.\n\nYou must keep it safe for [keepMonumentTicks_duration], otherwise [asker_nameDef] will be displeased.
  • You have destroyed the [problemCauserLabel] that was affecting [map_definite]!
  • You have recruited {SUBJECT_definite}, who you were charged to guard. [remainingWillNowLeave][failLetterEndingCommon]
  • You have successfully completed the quest '[resolvedQuestName]'!\n\n[lodgersLabelSingOrPluralDef] said [lodgersPronoun] [lodgersWasWere] willing to reward quality accommodation. The average mood of [lodgersLabelSingOrPluralDef] was {AVERAGEMOOD} during [theirHisHer] stay, so your goodwill with [asker_faction_name] has increased by {GOODWILL}
  • You have successfully completed the quest '[resolvedQuestName]'!\n\nWhile [lodgersLabelSingOrPluralDef] [lodgersWasWere] willing to reward quality accommodation, [theirHisHer] average mood was only {AVERAGEMOOD} during [theirHisHer] stay. You will receive no faction goodwill reward.
  • Your time limit to construct the monument has expired. [failLetterEndingCommon]

    • tips

    TipSetDef

    • tips <li>

    Parents:

    tips

    Attributes:

  • TKey="ChangeHeir"
  • TKey="EltexGear"
  • TKey="FreePsychicAmplifier"
  • TKey="IllegalImplantUse"
  • TKey="InstallingPsychicAmplifier"
  • TKey="MechClusterDormant"
  • TKey="MechClusterDormantTrigger"
  • TKey="MechClusterPowercell"
  • TKey="NoblesDemandPrivileges"
  • TKey="PsycastAdvantage"
  • TKey="PsycastFactionRelations"
  • TKey="PsycastInvisibility"
  • TKey="PsycastSensitivity"
  • TKey="PsychicEntropyLimit"
  • TKey="RoyalArmor"
  • TKey="RoyalTributeCollector"
  • TKey="SkipPsycastsMultiuse"
  • TKey="TitleInheritance"
  • TKey="TitleMilitaryAid"

    • Text:

  • Creatures with higher psychic sensitivity are affected more by psychics.
  • Dressing your psycasters in eltex gear will increase their neural heat limit and dissipation rate.
  • Gaining a new level of psylink grants knowledge of one random psychic power.
  • Going over your neural heat limit can save you in a desperate situation - but the psychic breakdown can last a while.
  • If a title holder dies, their title goes to their chosen heir.
  • Nobles from the Empire will demand all the privileges of their title. Your own titled colonists will be more flexible, unless they are greedy or jealous.
  • Prestige armor and eltex apparel will also satisfy the apparel requirements of royal titles.
  • Psychic invisibility doesn't wear off when you attack.
  • Psychic powers can give you significant advantage in combat.
  • Psylink neuroformers can be acquired through quests.
  • Some mech clusters remain dormant until disturbed. Use that time to prepare your attack.
  • Some title permits allow the holder to call for military aid. This can save you in a tough moment.
  • The Empire bestows a free level of psylink upon anyone who earns the title required to use it.
  • The Imperial royal tribute collector arrives twice per year, and accepts prisoners and gold in exchange for honor.
  • The psychic skip power works on self, allies, enemies, and even items. The tactical possibilities are endless.
  • Using a psychic power on an ally will harm faction relations - but only if it has negative effects.
  • When fighting a mech cluster, try shooting their power cells. They explode, dealing heavy damage to surrounding creatures and structures.
  • You can change the heir of a title holder through the comms console. However, this requires completing a ritual.
  • You can safely walk right past a dormant mech cluster, as long as you don't attack it or trigger a proximity activator.

    • Examples:

  • ..sers\admin\Desktop\Games\RimWorld.v1.2.2753\Data\Royalty\Defs\TipSetDefs\Tips.xml

    • value

    Parents:

    Children:

    value <li>

    Attributes:

  • TKey="LetterLabelChasingInfestation"
  • TKey="LetterLabelChasingManhunter"
  • TKey="LetterLabelChasingRaid"
  • TKey="LetterLabelSiteAppeared"
  • TKey="LetterTextChasingInfestation"
  • TKey="LetterTextChasingManhunter"
  • TKey="LetterTextChasingRaid"
  • TKey="LetterTextReturnAfterHelping"
  • TKey="LetterTextReturnAfterRoyalCourt"
  • TKey="LetterTextSiteAppeared"

    • Text:

  • \n[allSitePartsDescriptions]
  • \n[enemyFaction_leader_nameDef] swore to seek revenge on [joiner_nameDef] and all those associated with [joiner_objective], and sent [enemyFaction_pawnsPlural] to carry out the task.
  • \n[joiner_nameDef] was traveling when [joiner_pronoun] came upon a lost group of [animalKind_labelPlural]. [joiner_pronoun], in a bad mood, goaded the [animalKind_labelPlural]. Unexpectedly, they attacked [joiner_objective]. And they have followed [joiner_objective] a long distance.
  • \n[joiner_nameDef] was traveling when [joiner_pronoun] happened upon [enemyFaction_leader_nameFull], leader of [enemyFaction_name], sick on the side of the road. [joiner_nameDef] insulted [enemyFaction_leader_nameDef] by comparing [enemyFaction_leader_objective] to a [Animal].
  • \n[joiner_nameDef], greedy for the pleasures and money insect jelly can bring, intended to destroy a massive insect hive using poison. [joiner_pronoun] failed, but was doused in insect threat pheromones. Insects have been hunting [joiner_objective] ever since. Now they've launched their final attack.
  • \n[joiner_pronoun] was supposed to marry the child of [enemyFaction_leader_nameFull], leader of [enemyFaction_name]. [joiner_pronoun] became drunk before the ceremony and vomited on the altar - a flagrant insult towards [enemyFaction_leader_nameDef]'s whole family.
  • \n{BASETEXT}
  • \nNow [enemyFaction_leader_nameDef]'s [enemyFaction_pawnsPlural] are activating a site nearby to harass you.
  • $($colonistsToLendCount*$lendForDays)
  • $($gameConditionDifficulty * ($gameConditionDuration / 60000) * $pointsRewardFactor * 200)
  • $($helpersCount * $helperCombatPower)
  • $($lodgersCount * $lodgerRewardFactor * ($shuttleDelayTicks / 60000))
  • $($lodgersCount-1)
  • $($lodgersCountToGenerate - 1)
  • $($monumentRequiredResourcesMarketValue * randFloat(1.8, 1.9))
  • $($moodThreshold - 0.25) / (0.4 - 0.25)
  • $($points * $threatFactor * $threatCount * 1.1)
  • $($points * $threatFactor * $threatCount * 1.2)
  • $($points * $threatFactor * $threatCount * 1.4)
  • $($points * $threatFactor * $threatCount)
  • $($points * $threatFactor + 3 * $helpersPoints / $threatCount)
  • $($points + $helpersPoints)
  • $($pointsOriginal * 1.75)
  • $($rewardValue * $activeThreatDisturbanceFactor)
  • $($rewardValue + $lodgerRewardFromCountAndDelay * 100)
  • $($rewardValue + $lodgerRewardFromCountAndDelay * 25)
  • $($rewardValue + $lodgerRewardFromCountAndDelay * 45)
  • $($rewardValue + $lodgerRewardFromCountAndDelay * 60)
  • $($rewardValue + $lodgerRewardFromCountAndDelay * 70)
  • $($rewardValue + $lodgersCountWithMoodThreshold * $lodgerRewardFactor * ($shuttleDelayTicks / 60000) * $rewardFactorFromMoodThreshold)
  • $($rewardValue + $rewardValueFromThreats)
  • $(($growDays*2)+8)
  • $(0.5 + 0.1 * $lodgersBodySize)
  • $(10*60000)
  • $(15*60000)
  • $(3*60000)
  • $(lerp(30, 40, $lodgersMoodThresholdNormalized))
  • $(randInt(1, $helpersMaxCount))
  • $(roundToDigits($threatFactor, 1))
  • $(roundToTicksRough(randFloat(0.5, 1.5)*60000))
  • $(roundToTicksRough(randInt(10, 16)*60000))
  • $(roundToTicksRough(randInt(10, 25)*60000))
  • $(roundToTicksRough(randInt(1800, 2400)))
  • $(roundToTicksRough(randInt(20, 40)*60000))
  • $(roundToTicksRough(randInt(2500, 3400)))
  • $(roundToTicksRough(randInt(300, 60000)))
  • $(roundToTicksRough(randInt(41, 60)*60000))
  • $(roundToTicksRough(randInt(5, 15)*60000))
  • $(roundToTicksRough(randInt(5, 25)*60000))
  • $(roundToTicksRough(randInt(6000, 300000)))
  • $(roundToTicksRough(randInt(61, 80)*60000))
